title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Health & Glow

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Health & Glow
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Health & Glow in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Health & Glow:
Health & Glow is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Health & Glow!
